summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
The Red Events Group is a Scottish event hire company specializing in premium decor, LED dancefloors, photobooths, and related services for weddings, proms, corporate events, and parties.

---

## 🏢 Company Details

- **Company Name**: The Red Events Group (originally launched as "Big Bright Letters" in 2016)
- **Headquarters/Main Area**: Glasgow, Scotland
- **Service Coverage**: All of Scotland (Borders to Highlands & Islands), with most work in the Central Belt (Glasgow, Edinburgh, Stirling, Perth & Ayrshire). Has also supplied events as far as Skye, Inverness, and even Leicester.

## 🛍️ Products & Services

- LED Dancefloors
- Letter Lights (originally 14 lights, now over 100 5ft lights)
- Photobooths (including Fotomaster Magic Mirrors)
- Audio Guestbooks (tabletop compact and full-size phonebooth versions) – new for 2024
- Shimmerwalls
- Candy Carts, Donut Walls
- Chiavari Chair Hire, Table Hire
- Backdrop Hire, Neon Signs
- Wedding Decor, Corporate Packages, Prom Hire
- Delivery & setup across Scotland

## 🎯 Target Audience

- Weddings
- Birthdays
- Proms
- Corporate events
- Any event requiring premium decor and entertainment

## 💎 Unique Selling Points

- High-quality, premium hire stock
- Five-star reviews
- Delivery across Scotland (including remote areas)
- Over 2,000 events served
- Experienced team (launched in 2016, expanded from letter lights to full event decor)

## 📞 Contact Information

- **Email**: sales@redevents.co.uk
- **Contact form available on website** (no phone number listed in provided data)
- **Social media**: linked on website (not specified further)
